package rulecoverage

func PositiveYamlUnmarshalUntrustedInput() string {
    ruleID := "yaml_unmarshal_untrusted_input"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`yaml.Unmarshal(untrustedInput, &target)` using `gopkg.in/yaml.v2` without size limits"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
